categories.label: Community
categories.description: Join public discussion, attend recurring updates, and find a low-friction entry point.

categories.label: Learning
categories.description: Start with learning repositories, public study material, and recurring education sessions.

categories.label: Media
categories.description: Watch, listen, and review public recordings, streams, podcasts, and interviews.

categories.label: Projects
categories.description: Browse open repositories and project surfaces connected to Institute work.

categories.label: Research
categories.description: Use shared research and ecosystem references to orient deeper work.

categories.label: Support
categories.description: Support public education, research infrastructure, events, and ecosystem stewardship.

categories.label: Social
categories.description: Follow public social channels for signals from the Institute and community.

resources.summary: Primary public community channel for conversation, coordination, and newcomer orientation.
Recurring public update surface for activity orientation and current work.
Learning repository for getting started with Active Inference materials and pathways.
Living public map of the Institute, ecosystem, activities, and conceptual context.
Public video channel for seminars, streams, educational sessions, and community recordings.
Direct handle for the public YouTube presence.
Index of public videos and podcasts for browsing by format and topic.
Podcast destination for Active Inference conversations and interviews.
Public GitHub organization for Institute repositories and open-source work.
Project repository for multiagent Active Inference modeling work.
Generalized Notation Notation project repository for model communication.
Geospatial modeling repository connected to ecological and bioregional applications.
Research and publication-oriented repository for the Active Inference Journal.
Donation pathway for supporting public education, events, infrastructure, and stewardship.
Public social profile for community updates.
Public social page for Institute visibility.
Public organization profile for professional updates.
